title: Sochi、Krasnodar Krai — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Sochi、Krasnodar Krai的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Sochi是Krasnodar Krai的一個城市，人口約445,000。Russia’s premier Black Sea resort, host of the 2014 Winter Olympics, with a subtropical climate, beautiful beaches, and mountain ski resorts.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
